tasks.subject: Task 0: Prisma schema migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `completedAt DateTime?` to the Task model and apply the migration locally.

**Files:**
- Modify: `prisma/schema.prisma`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `completedAt DateTime?` present in `Task` model
- [ ] Migration file created and applied locally
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes

**Verify:** `npx prisma migrate status` → all migrations applied

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma"], "verifyCommand": "npx prisma migrate status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["completedAt field added", "migration applied", "tsc passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Set/clear completedAt in PATCH route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When `done=true` set `completedAt=now()`, when `done=false` clear it to `null`. Recurring task path is unaffected.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] done=true (non-recurring) → completedAt set to current timestamp
- [ ] done=false → completedAt set to null
- [ ] Recurring task advance path → completedAt not included
- [ ] All existing tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/\[id\]/route.test.ts` → all passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/\\[id\\]/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["completedAt set on done=true", "completedAt null on done=false", "recurring path unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Sort archive by completedAt in GET route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When `GET /api/tasks?done=true`, sort results by `completedAt desc nulls last`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] done=true requests use completedAt desc nulls last sort
- [ ] Other requests use existing sort logic unchanged
- [ ] All tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts` → all passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/tasks/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["archive sorted by completedAt desc", "other sorts unchanged", "all tests pass"]}
```
